title: thymus fedtschenkoi var. handelii
intro: Thymus fedtschenkoi var. handelii, also known as Handel's thyme or mountain thyme, is a variant of the thymus fedtschenkoi plant, a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Handel's thyme include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and aid in digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Handel's thyme can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or essential oil, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat respiratory problems, skin conditions, and wounds.
